title: helonias alpina
intro: Helonias alpina, also known as American goldenseal or colic root, is a perennial plant native to the eastern United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helonias alpina are attributed to its ability to treat digestive issues, such as colic and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Helonias alpina can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
